title: Plus extra
description: a light weight, vanilla-like mod, focused on a good adventuring experience. A instance which you can use as a base game and add the mods you want. STILL UNDER DEVELOPMENT.
body:
a light weight, optimized, vanilla-like base game.

- Modified world gen, with new biomes in all dimensions, new ores, new mobs, new crops, new blocks for buildings, completely overhauling the world gen already known by the players with mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- New ways of enchanting, with new enchanting tables. Now you dont need to breed villager anymore
- A bunch of QOL features such as the mod [Mouse wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie), which allows you to pick up, change and transfer items more easily and convenently
- New furnaces for all diferent levels of smelting
- New storage systems, not so technological but not so archaic as a chest only
- [Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery) mod that allows you to smelt and get more resources 
- Animations for mobs, doors and some other things
- [Physics mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod)
- Little tweaks into the sounds of the game in general (footsteps, blocks breaking, eating, etc.)
- A bunch of Optimzation mods (including [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium))

But all of this, without taking away the vanilla flavor of the game

_disclaimer: this is a base game. you can play it as it is now, but you can also use it as a base and add as many mods you wish (or as many as your pc handles it)._

Have fun!

**STILL UNDER DEVELOPMENT, SOME MODS MIGHT BE ADDED OR REMOVED THROUGHT TIME**
